_comment: ATO open-source pricing rate card. Public, version-controlled, customer-auditable. Anyone running the Methodology Runner can read this file to understand exactly what we charge ourselves for compute/storage/judge — same numbers the runner's pre-run cost estimate uses. If our actual cloud bills go up, this file gets a PR. No black-box pricing math. See docs/methodology-runner.md for full spec.

rates._comment_judge: LLM-judge default cost per call. claude-haiku-4-5 averaged ~$0.001 per scoring call in Q2 2026. Override at methodology-create time via rubric.judge_model.
rates._comment_compute: Railway shared CPU baseline 2026-Q2. Methodology orchestration burns minimal seconds per dispatch (the LLM call dominates wall-clock). Re-calibrated quarterly from actual invoice.
rates._comment_storage: Cloudflare R2 standard tier 2026-Q2. Per-byte per-month. Receipts + transcripts persisted for trace retention. Typical methodology run = ~10MB compressed.
rates._comment_bandwidth: Cloudflare R2 egress 2026-Q2. Per byte transferred out. Dominated by receipt-pull traffic to the GUI / MCP clients.

free._comment: Lets new users run one small methodology to see the loop. Anyone running n=10/cell × 3 cells (=30 dispatches) fits here.

pro._comment: The headline tier. Covers a typical customer running one model-ladder methodology weekly at n=30/cell. Dispatch costs paid by the customer's API keys (byok).

team._comment: For teams running multiple methodologies per agent per week. Includes $50/seat of pool-key credit so the team can run methodologies against models they don't have personal API keys for.

sample_size_advice._comment: Recommendations the runner surfaces at methodology-create time. Industry references in the same struct so customers see the bar AND our suggestion in the same prompt.

industry_baseline.label: publishable internal evals — recommended for production decisions

source_invoices._comment: Where each rate constant comes from. Quarterly re-calibration target.
source_invoices.llm_judge: Anthropic claude-haiku-4-5 averaged across Q2 2026 internal calls

history.change: Initial rate card published with v2.10 PR-1 Methodology Runner foundation.
